meta.name: Update The Blind Box Opening Results

document_api_meta.title: Update The Blind Box Opening Results
document_api_meta.env_desc: After the merchant completes the blind box opening in the live room, then the blind box results are transmitted back to the platform, after which the user can view the unboxing results in the order details

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: main_order_id
request_body_param.desc: The unique identifier for a TikTok Shop order.

request_body_param.name: blind_box_results
request_body_param.desc: Unboxing results for line items under orders.

request_body_param.name: ^order_line_id
request_body_param.desc: Line item id in TikTok Shop.

request_body_param.name: ^blind_result_product_id
request_body_param.desc: Unboxing results corresponding to TikTok Shop product id.

request_body_param.name: ^blind_result_sku_id
request_body_param.desc: Unboxing results corresponding to TikTok Shop sku id.

request_body_param.name: ^blind_open_time
request_body_param.desc: Unboxing timestamp. Only UNIX format is accepted.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

error_code_list.msg: Current order is not a merchant blind box order.
Invalid params, please check that all required parameters are not illegal.
The order information has not been obtained.
Order update failed, please contract platform.
The product information has not been obtained. Please confirm whether the product information is synchronized to Tiktok Shop.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.OrderV202511API.Order202511OrdersBlindBoxResultCallbackPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody := order_v202511.NewOrder202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody()
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody.SetMainOrderId("576461413038785752")
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults := order_v202511.NewOrder202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults()
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults.SetOrderLineId("577086512123755123")
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults.SetBlindResultProductId("1732042550463074704")
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults.SetBlindResultSkuId("1732042694638604688")
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults.SetBlindOpenTime(1762782183118)
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResultsList := []order_v202511.Order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults{*order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResults}
    order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody.SetBlindBoxResults(order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBodyBlindBoxResultsList)
    request = request.Order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody(*order202511UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResultsRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to have access to all of seller's order data in real-time via API.
scope_list.auth_info: The Partner will be able to have access to all of your order data in real-time via API. The Partner will be able to obtain your order status and order details for data reconciliation.
